eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Morton; Mercer; Oliver; Grant; Sioux, ND; at 1:44 PM on JUL 14, 2019 Effective until 5:44 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A shelter has been established for persons affected by the 31st Ave. NW Apartment Complex Fire in Mandan. The Shelter is located at the Mandan Middle School.
